## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly catch-up to discuss team updates, workload, and address any concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nika's schedule change with Vivek has significantly improved energy levels and work experience](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Daniel to assist with publishing starting Monday, pending SOP creation and training](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Usman making progress with Galileo, benefiting from Vivek's guidance](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Team capacity is challenging but manageable; additional support measures being implemented](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

## Topics

### Schedule Optimization

  - [Nika's new schedule, arranged with Vivek, has led to best week since joining](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Improved energy levels and work satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Previous schedule led to overwhelm due to unexpected live chats after typical work hours](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Workload Management

  - [Daniel to start helping with publishing from Monday](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Nika creating updated SOPs and recording training videos for Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Publishing responsibilities for both Ramp (Sanity CMS) and DataGrid (Webflow) are time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Team capacity is tight but manageable; members helping each other](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

### Client-Specific Updates

  - [Ramp described as "picky" client with strict deadlines and high volume](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [DataGrid requires consistent Webflow work, which is time-intensive](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Usman experiencing improved progress with Galileo after initial back-and-forth on articles](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

### Team Support and Communication

  - [Vivek praised for problem-solving skills and genuine interest in team's experience](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Mara offered support for answering client questions in chat](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Team encouraged to reach out to Mara for any concerns or issues](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement Daniel's assistance with publishing starting Monday](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Nika to complete SOPs and training materials for Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/7hvmzsAw7x1oSrFMvAHkUZUA1tmJMzCx?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
